positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a roaring, majestic lion surrounded by geometric floral patterns and stylized constellations. The lion should have a confident, regal silhouette. The overall style is Neo-Traditional Tattoo Art mixed with Celestial/Astrological motifs, rendered with bold linework, flat blocks of color, and high contrast. Composition must be centered, suitable for a circular print placement. Use a palette of deep indigo, mustard yellow, terracotta orange, and forest green. Perfect for screen printing on fabric. Isolated on a clean, off-white background.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, noise, smudge, poor detail, realistic photograph, photorealism, grainy
